title: G-One Auto Parts de México S.A. de C.V. ransomware incident

victim.name: G-One Auto Parts de México S.A. de C.V.

extortion.description: [AI generated] G-One Auto Parts de México S.A. de C.V. is a Mexican company specializing in the distribution and sale of automotive parts. It focuses on providing high-quality components for various vehicle makes and models, serving both retail and wholesale markets. The company is known for its customer-centric approach, competitive pricing, and extensive inventory, catering to the needs of automotive professionals and enthusiasts alike.
